title: Techindustry
description: With this mod you can experiment with many new components for automation. You can build rockets to explore the solar system and land on other planetary bodies and you can even build space stations.
body:
With this mod you can experiment with many new components for automation. You can build rockets to explore the solar system and land on other planetary bodies and you can even build space stations.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix

Support Server: https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt

Fly to planets!
mine ores with quarries
automate
get quantum armor
Main mods:

- Create Fabric - start a factory and automate with this amazing addition

- Ad Astra - so you can fly to other planets

- Applied Energistics 2 - for advanced and ordered storage of your items

- Traveler's Backpack [Fabric]

- Modern Industrialization - advanced technology, automatic mines

- MinecraftCapes Mod

A small modpack for you and your friends, have fun!
